creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, it seems like there is a new release of the libstemmer distfile (they don't version their releases, just roll a new distfile, doh!) so the filesize does not match:

===>   Returning to build of sphinxsearch-2.2.6
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: fetch-depends  >============================
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for sphinxsearch-2.2.6
=> libstemmer_c.tgz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://snowball.tartarus.org/dist/libstemmer_c.tgz
fetch: http://snowball.tartarus.org/dist/libstemmer_c.tgz: size mismatch: expected 129592, actual 129584
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/libstemmer_c.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/libstemmer_c.tgz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
